source_configs.name: Micron IR
source_configs.type: Investor relations / latest news / quarterly results

source_configs.name: Transcript parser
source_configs.type: Keynote / earnings call / analyst Q&A parsing

alerts.title: NVDA mentions context memory or KV cache
alerts.condition: Trigger when transcript contains context memory, KV cache, memory hierarchy, or AI-native storage.
alerts.action: Send priority alert and recalculate readthrough scores.

alerts.title: Networking language shifts toward scale-out or fabric bottlenecks
alerts.scope: ANET / MRVL / ALAB / CRDO / LITE / COHR
alerts.condition: Trigger on scale-out, network fabric, optical interconnect, or bandwidth bottleneck language.
alerts.action: Raise connectivity cluster sensitivity and review cross-readthrough from NVDA.

alerts.title: AI deployment highlights liquid cooling or power constraints
alerts.condition: Trigger on liquid cooling, AI-ready power, rack density, or thermal bottleneck phrasing.
alerts.action: Increase deployment bottleneck score and power/cooling importance.

NVDA.label: AI factory / inference demand
NVDA.note: Broader system demand expands platform revenue opportunity.

NVDA.label: Deployment speed
NVDA.note: Faster validated deployment accelerates revenue conversion; delays push timing right.

MU.label: HBM shipments
MU.note: Shipment growth directly lifts AI memory revenue.

MU.label: Pricing discipline
MU.note: Constructive pricing improves gross margin and EPS conversion.

SNDK.label: Context memory relevance
SNDK.note: Can re-rate SNDK from commodity NAND to AI storage layer.

SNDK.label: Design wins / sampling
SNDK.note: Commercial validation is required for roadmap to become earnings.

events.title: NVIDIA expands AI factory framing and highlights inference economics
events.text: Jensen emphasizes AI factory buildout, inference economics, memory hierarchy, and system-level deployment.

readthrough.summary: HBM and memory hierarchy benefit from stronger AI platform intensity.
Inference storage and context-memory narratives improve.
Scale-out networking demand strengthens alongside AI factories.

events.title: Arista highlights AI scale-out demand and stronger network fabric adoption
events.text: Management points to scale-out cluster demand, AI network fabric upgrades, and stronger deployment visibility.

readthrough.summary: Platform demand broadens from chips to fabric and cluster economics.
Connectivity readthrough improves for adjacent infrastructure names.

events.title: Vertiv stresses liquid cooling and dense AI deployment readiness
events.text: Vertiv highlights liquid cooling adoption, AI-ready power infrastructure, and rack-density bottlenecks.

readthrough.summary: Dense AI deployment underscores system-level infrastructure needs.
